backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the backend, defining data types (videos, messages, thumbnails, view records, domain verification) and state maps, with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and blob storage via MixinStorage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report specifying that VideoManagementPanel.tsx must display geographic view breakdown for all stored view records (including pre-feature ones), showing entries without country data as 'Unknown'.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering components, hooks, pages, and configuration files for the React/TanStack Router application.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file setting up Tailwind directives and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a monochromatic light/dark color theme including sidebar and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app titled 'MECT EW', mounting the React app at the #root div and loading main.tsx as a module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component configuring TanStack Router with all page routes, QueryClient with staleTime 0, ThemeProvider for dark mode, and a Layout that shows a ProfileSetupModal for authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard component with a two-tab interface for managing messages (MessageManagement) and configuring a custom domain (DomainManagement).
frontend/src/components/ContactForm.tsx: Reusable contact form component with name, email, and message fields that validates input and submits to the backend via the useSubmitContactForm mutation hook, accepting a formType prop to distinguish form contexts.
frontend/src/components/DomainManagement: React component for managing a custom domain configuration, allowing users to set up DNS records (CNAME and TXT) and verify DNS propagation via Google's DNS API, with force-verification mutation support.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying a copyright notice with a heart icon and a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/FormSpecificMess: Component that displays and manages messages for a specific form type, supporting reply and delete operations via dialogs and backend mutations.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header with logo, desktop/mobile nav links, Internet Identity authentication, and an admin badge shown when the authenticated user is an admin.
frontend/src/components/ManualVideoUploa: Component for uploading video files (up to 2GB) to the backend, supporting title input, category selection, upload progress tracking, and multiple video formats.
frontend/src/components/MessageManagemen: Admin component for viewing, filtering, replying to, and deleting all messages across form types (consultoría, mentoría, contacto) with status and form-type filters.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts a newly authenticated user to enter their name and save their profile via a backend mutation before proceeding.
frontend/src/components/ScreenRecorder.t: A React component that allows authenticated users to record their screen, preview the recording, and upload it with a title and category to the backend using the uploadVideo mutation.
frontend/src/components/VideoGallery.tsx: A React component that displays a grid of videos with thumbnails, supports playback via a dialog (streaming from the actor), and allows admins to delete videos.
A placeholder component that renders a card indicating video management functionality is currently unavailable.
frontend/src/components/VideoManagementP: An admin panel component for managing videos, supporting title editing, category moving, thumbnail upload, deletion, view count display, and geographic breakdown of viewers per video.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with the user's identity and an admin token, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: A collection of React Query hooks for interacting with the backend actor, covering user profiles, admin checks, video CRUD operations, view counts, contact forms, and messaging.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for a monochromatic grayscale design system in both light and dark modes, plus scrollbar and utility styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page displaying biographical text about the site owner's background as a technical analyst specializing in Elliott Wave Theory.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin page that gates access to the AdminPanel component behind Internet Identity authentication and an admin role check, showing appropriate error states otherwise.
frontend/src/pages/AnalysisPage.tsx: Analysis page that displays a tabbed video gallery organized by financial market categories, with admin-only tools for screen recording, manual video upload, and video management.
frontend/src/pages/ConsultancyPage.tsx: Consultancy page with a contact form for consultation requests and an admin-only message management panel, with unauthorized access alerts for non-admin authenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page with a general contact form and an admin-only message management panel, with unauthorized access alerts for non-admin authenticated users.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Full-viewport hero page displaying a grayscale financial markets background image with no additional content.
frontend/src/pages/MentoringPage.tsx: Mentoring page with a contact form for mentorship inquiries and an admin-only message management panel, with unauthorized access alerts for non-admin authenticated users.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read, persist, and clear URL query parameters from both standard query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, font family, accordion keyframes, and enabling the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Persistent project state document (version 20) describing the MECT EW ICP-deployed web app's architecture, tech stack, known bugs, and feature summary including video management, authentication, and domain verification workflows.
